query: I want to add user authentication with JWT tokens to this Express API, the routes are in src/routes/ and I need both login and register endpoints

refactor the database layer — we're currently using raw SQL queries scattered everywhere in src/services/ and I want to consolidate them into a proper repository pattern with typed queries

can you review the changes I just made to the auth middleware? I changed how tokens are validated and want to make sure I didn't break anything
I just finished implementing the search feature across 12 files. Can we ship this? The tests pass locally but I want to make sure everything is solid before creating the PR
let me start from scratch — I want to build a CLI tool in Rust that manages dotfiles across machines. It should support symlinks, templates with variables, and encrypted secrets
the performance of our GraphQL resolvers is terrible — the users query takes 3 seconds because of N+1 queries. I need to add dataloader batching without breaking the existing resolver signatures
I want to add end-to-end tests for the login flow and the dashboard page. We're using Next.js and I think Playwright would be good for this
